CustomField.description: Check data quality based on important fields for a company
CustomField.formula: IF(ISPICKVAL(Distributor_Type__c,""), 0,20) + IF(ISPICKVAL(Sub_Type__c,""), 0,10) + IF(ISPICKVAL(In__c,""), 0,10) + IF(ISPICKVAL(Final_Distribution__c,""), 0,15) + IF(ISPICKVAL(LegalForm__c,""), 0,20) + IF(LEN(BillingCity) = 0, 0,5) + IF(LEN(BillingStreet) = 0, 0,5) + IF(LEN(BillingCountry) = 0, 0,5) + IF(LEN(Phone) = 0, 0,10)
CustomField.label: Data Quality Score
